$comment: Canonical: docs/prd.md#112-protocol-asset-vault (issue #482). Expected Uniswap V3 mid prices for the landing-page price strip, pinned to the Base mainnet fork point recorded in testing/ethereum-testnet/config/fork-block.json. `fork_block` MUST equal that manifest's `block_number` — the CI guard `fork_block_aligns_with_expected_prices` in testing/smoke-test/src/fork_manifest.rs fails the build if the fork block changes without this fixture being refreshed in the same commit. The fork integration test (testing/fork-e2e-rust/tests/landing_price_strip_fork.rs) reads each pool's slot0 from the running forked-Base devnet, converts via the shared sqrtPriceX96 math, and asserts the result matches `expected_price` within `tolerance_pct`. The Playwright fork test asserts the rendered cells match these same values.
$capture_note: expected_price values are captured by booting the forked-Base devnet (or anvil against a Base archive RPC) at fork_block and reading each pool's slot0, then applying testing/fork-e2e-rust price conversion. Refresh with scripts/devnet/snapshot-fork.sh whenever the fork block is bumped. When `captured` is false the fork integration test reads slot0 and records the live value but does not assert the magnitude (it still asserts the pool exists); flip `captured` to true after pinning real values against an archive RPC.
